title: Validating JSON Data with XPath Expressions
scenario: Create an XPath expression to validate a JSON object representing user data. The JSON object contains fields for username, email, and password. The expression should verify that the username is at least 3 characters long, the email is a valid email address, and the password is at least 8 characters long. The output should be an XPath expression under 100 characters.
constraints: Must use a single XPath expression
Must validate all fields using a single expression

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated XPath expression is syntactically correct.
Check if the generated XPath expression meets the specified constraints, specifically using a single expression and validating all fields.
Check if the generated XPath expression is readable and easy to understand.
